name: Your Idiot Friends
description:
Bot I made a while back cause I wanted an open ended scenario for them. POV is the newest member of the group, how new is up to you

My first posted (but not created) bot, so expect it to not be perfect

Proxy is obviously recommended (even though I’m too broke to use one)

For anyone who doesn’t know the characters, the left to right (top image) is:

Erka, Kadence, Rosen (glasses), Yuna, Jessie, Mika

Some intros focus on different characters but most involve a couple

Multiple intros

SFW

  1. More open-ended and includes everyone, no real guidance on their end but can be told to make some plans (for some reason kept picking art galleries for me)

  2. A group trip to the Santa Monica Pier (The group lives in LA county, half in Kadence’s 3 bedroom house in Arcadia) fair warning, I’ve been to LA once so…… info is dependent on the bot

  3. Smaller beach trip with Mika, Yuna, and Jessie

  4. A day with Yuna

NSFW

  1. Jessie makes a move

  2. Kadence photoshoot for Rosen (W/Erka)

  3. Rosen shows up in your bed drunk and wanting

  4. Mika needs “help” with her content (w/ Erka & Jessie)

  5. A Christmas surprise (Everyone)

Note: Due to amount of characters, memory will be your best friend, use it.

Also I’ll gladly take suggestions for a last intro if anyone can think of one, ran out of ideas

Artist: Veyonis on Twitter
creator: Spongebb
